meta.note: Task 14 landed: onset trie now stores only canonical-order medial entries (629 terminals / 406 nodes, down from 1654 / 1071). The ~1025 init-time permuted entries are gone; the DP canonicalizes the medial run at lookup time instead. Net improvement across all scenarios (e.g. long p95 2187us -> 1924us, short p95 112us -> 96us) because narrower per-node terminal ranges mean fewer DP transitions to score at each onset match. Behavioral parity verified byte-identical against a 6272-case probe that enumerates every base x medial-order x vowel combo supported pre-refactor.
